positive: A stylized, maximalist repeating pattern inspired by celestial mythology. The main subjects are abstract, geometric representations of constellations (like Orion, Ursa Major) intertwined with highly detailed, symmetrical floral elements (lotus flowers, celestial arabesques) and zodiac glyphs. The aesthetic is luxurious, vintage occult meets modern scientific illustration. Use a deep navy blue and burnt gold color palette with accents of ethereal teal. The composition must be perfectly balanced, ensuring high contrast and clear, defined lines suitable for screen printing on fabric. The overall feeling is mysterious, cosmic, and regal. Clean silhouettes are paramount.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, messy, grunge, poor anatomy, abstract, noise, dirty, faded, jpeg artifacts
